Title: Friends Reunited
Author: Severcroft23
Description: A few years after completing their education at Hogwarts Draco and Hermione rekindle their friendship. How will their future develop?

Title: Lady Consort
Author: GaeilgeRua
Description: He learned of her existence during her imprisonment, and in that time, the Dark Lord quickly learned two things about Luna Lovegood.

Title: Truths and Dares
Author: AGayMess
Description: Harry receives a letter from Draco inviting him to a game of truth or dare and revealing the truth- Draco is crushing on Harry. But what Draco didn't know when he sent that letter was that the feelings were mutual. *06/04-Guys, I am posting an alternate ending!

Title: Insanity Check!
Author: Moonddancer32
Description: Hermione is finishing her apprenticeship at Saint Mungos and is sent to the Mental Ward to work. Her personal patient is non-other than an abusive Snape, but is he as insane as they claim? And what happens when she discovers abuse and betrayal of a Healers oath? Rated for later Chapters.

Title: Feather and Rock
Author: mynameisnicse
Description: Hermione is a successful university lecturer and travels Europe to give guest speeches. On one of those occasions she meets a man everybody had presumed dead for ten years. As time passes they become friends, confidants and eventually lovers. A story about friendship, homesickness, hope and love. Slow burn. M for later chapters. Mature scenes clearly indicated.

Title: Monochrome
Author: The BlackStaff and NightMarE
Description: Memories are dangerous things. You twist them and you turn them until you know every touch and corner, but you'll find an edge to cut you still. Twisted between his very own mind and a resurrected dark lord, Harry Potter is on the clock. Great men rise from desperate beginnings, and Harry is playing the most desperate game of them all. Set after 4th year. AU.

Title: James Sirius
Author: totallypenguinning
Description: "So, really, what I'm trying to say is that the whole "perfect family" act is just that, an act." James Sirius Potter wrote a memoir that peels back the curtain on the Potters. Turns out, the family has some shocking horror stories that his parents have worked hard to keep from the Wizarding World.

Title: Mientras dure la niebla
Author: bellatrix996
Description: Comienza el tercer curso tras la derrota de Voldemort. Hermione trata de superar el pasado y trabaja como profesora en Hogwarts. El terror vuelve cuando descubre que Bellatrix Lestrange, la mortífaga que la torturó, es la nueva profesora de Defensa contra las Artes Oscuras. / Bellamione

Title: Pain of love (Severus Snape love story)
Author: DracoTatzeSnape
Description: Arya Jackson is the daughter of Tom Riddle and fairy Leyanne. The true burden of her blood begins with a magical journey in Hogwarts. Torn between her Gryffindor friends and Slytherin family, Arya desperately fights the house rivalry. Her secret connection with Severus Snape grows stronger and even more complicated. Yet it turns into a powerful weapon in the upcoming wizarding war.

Title: Whole
Author: rumplefugs
Description: Finding herself being prepared for war, Hermione struggles to keep control of her life. When the final battle is over and done with, will the emptiness and lack of purpose consume her, or will she find stability in old acquaintances? Themes of depression, trauma, and difficult love. Rated M for later chapters. Starts from book 5, continues past DH.

Title: Drafts Corner
Author: Ausar The Vile
Description: Several ideas or plot bunnies that I have for Harry Potter, but have not enough time to realize it into a story. Some ideas might be crossovering with another fandoms.

Title: Marcus and Oliver: The Story of Us
Author: DarylDixon'sgirl1985
Description: Marcus Flint has had a crush on Oliver Wood for as long as he can remember. But what happens when during their sixth year his best mate, Emmy Wood, takes matters into her own hands? Will Oliver and Marcus start dating? Will everything work out for Marcus in the end or will he be left under a striped-umbrella broken heated?

Title: Riddle's Son
Author: stevem1
Description: A very dark AU. The Potters are killed in Godric's Hollow. Dumbledore schemes to protect the prophesied child, Neville Longbottom, when Voldemort and Bellatrix Black's infant son comes under his control. Harry lives again, in a fashion. Harry Potter is owned by JK Rowlings. This story is for practice only. The portrait is of Russian officer Dmitry Furmanov by Sergey Malyutin.

Title: Erase una vez un romance en Hogwarts (Dramione)
Author: L.Nott
Description: Draco y Luna son un par de primos, bastante listos y muy unidos, los cuales tienen en mente conquistar a un par de sabelotodo. Draco por su parte empieza a ser bastante obvio con sus sentimientos para con Hermione y Luna empieza a ver en Theo, a un chico ademas de guapo bastante interesante.

Title: The Potter Twins : The Philosopher's Stone
Author: Lenaselena
Description: Elena James Potter adalah anak pertama Lily Evans dan James Potter. Kakak Kandung dari Harry James Potter, usia mereka terpaut 3 bulan. Sebuah insiden menewaskan kedua orang tua mereka, insiden dimana Voldemort melemparkan kutukan Avada Kedavra pada mereka berdua. Voldemort mencoba membunuh Harry Potter, namun kutukan itu justru memantul kembali ke pemiliknya.

Title: Meetings
Author: Celtic Daughter
Description: Fleur and Hermione meet for the first time during the Triwizard Tournament and they met a few other times after. It's only three years after that their souls recognize each other. Right in the middle of a war. How will their families and friends react to such news? *Femslash* Hermione/Fleur

Title: Comedy of Errors
Author: unleashrose
Description: What could go wrong on the Potters first outing as a family of three?

Title: The One Where Peter isn't the Secret Keeper
Author: DarylDixon'sgirl1985
Description: What would have happened if Peter had decided not to join Lord Voldemort's side?

Title: Colours of the Heart
Author: Phoenixofslytherin
Description: The world is currently a dangerous place and Ginny Weasley's one night of passion with an unexpected person has left her with a choice to make. Does she really have what it takes to join a Slytherin defection from the Dark Lord? And can they ever truly be free? Following her heart was the easiest thing Ginny has ever done. The future is now up to them all...

Title: It Started with Detention
Author: Elizabethangryffyndor
Description: After a surprising and fun filled unsupervised detention, Harry and Draco find them selves trying to navigate post-war life as friends instead of enemies, but is friendship enough for these two passionate men?

Title: Harry Potter: King of the Amazons
Author: TheSilverboar
Description: Harry Potter, set adrift by his Uncle, washes ashore of the island inhabited by the Warrior Women race the Amazons where he fulfills an ancient prophecy and finds a new home that will raise him to be strong. Manipulative Dumbledore, Weasley Bashing, Hermione Bashing

Title: Harry Potter and the New World Order
Author: Sarcalogos
Description: Harry is trying to make sense of a world without war. What will he do with his nemesis destroyed? Will he finish his education? Will his friends be by his side and will Ginny ever talk to him again?

Title: The Christmas Year
Author: Tess the Hatter
Description: When Hermione trips over one snowy afternoon, she does not expect to hit her knee quite so hard, and she most definitely does not expect to find an old childhood nemesis laying around with hypothermia. This is the story of how Hermione rescues Draco, how fate and irony snake around them, and how their lives change. DM/HG. Warning: difficult themes

Title: The Magical Princess
Author: faithhopelove23
Description: Evelyn Romanov, a descendant of the Tsar of Russia, joins the wizarding world at the age of eleven. Leaving the only life she's ever known, Evelyn is faced with rumors of evil and rumors of her family. She can only find solace in Charlie Weasley.

Title: The Bother Of Being A Brother
Author: CupCakeyyy
Description: The day had come - his Hogwarts letter had arrived and he needed his first set of school robes. But people are weird, the shop is weird, and the only normal thing in his life had run away as soon as he had had the chance to. Dang it.
